site.name: getsites
site.title: getsites — Premium website templates, easy to make yours
site.description: Premium Framer templates that look custom-built and edit like a slide deck. Copy one, put your words in, and go live today — some are completely free.

templates.name: Still
templates.tagline: A film photographer's contact sheet, alive.
templates.description: Still is a portfolio template for film photographers and visual artists. Your work hangs on a contact sheet — marked up, circled, honest. Editorial type, a photo archive CMS, and motion that stays out of the photograph's way.

templates.name: The Aubrey
templates.description: The Aubrey is a dark, cinematic template for members' clubs, bars, restaurants and hospitality brands. Candlelit motion, a velvet-rope invitation flow, events and journal CMS — the whole house, ready to open.

templates.name: Brookmere
templates.description: Brookmere is a single-page template for boutique finance, wealth management and private advisory firms. Serif restraint, an emerald palette, and a working invitation form — quiet money, done right.

templates.name: Fern Hollow
templates.tagline: Boutique stays and cabin rentals, warm and quiet.
templates.description: Fern Hollow is a free template for boutique stays, cabins and rentals. Warm photography-first layout, gallery and booking sections, and copy that feels like a host, not a hotel chain. Free, forever.

templates.name: Nostalgia.exe
templates.tagline: A Windows-XP operating system as a portfolio.
templates.description: Nostalgia.exe turns your portfolio into a fully working retro operating system. BIOS boot, draggable windows, Minesweeper, a BSOD 404 and three easter eggs. The portfolio nobody closes in five seconds.

components.name: The Wire
components.tagline: Templates hung on a drying line, swaying on pegs.

components.name: ReelCarousel
components.tagline: A 3D reel carousel. Drop in, bind, spin.

components.name: asciii
components.tagline: Cards render as live monochrome ASCII, develop on hover.
